title: Directive watcher + dashboard UI: nested dirs, project cards, completion gate

tasks.title: Rename DirectiveInitiative to DirectiveProject in all type files

dod.criterion: DirectiveInitiative renamed to DirectiveProject in server/types.ts and src/stores/types.ts
DirectiveProject has totalTasks and completedTasks fields

tasks.title: Rewrite directive-watcher.ts for nested directory structure

dod.criterion: Watcher reads .context/directives/{name}/directive.json (directory format only, no flat fallback)
Watcher globs projects/*/project.json within each directive directory
DirectiveProject[] built from project.json files with task counts
Pipeline steps derived from directive.json gates object when available

tasks.title: Update DirectiveProgress.tsx: projects terminology, task counts, completion gate

dod.criterion: All initiative text replaced with project
Each project row shows task progress (completedTasks/totalTasks)
Project cards expandable inline to show task list with status
Completion gate renders Awaiting CEO sign-off banner when status is awaiting_completion

tasks.title: Update all game panels: IntelPanel, FurniturePanels, ProjectsPanel, GamePage

dod.criterion: FurniturePanels: 'No initiative in progress' → 'No project in progress'
Active work derivation uses .projects for in-progress items

tasks.title: Update WorkSummary: features → projects terminology alignment

dod.criterion: WorkSummary labels use 'projects' instead of 'features' where referring to project.json entities

tasks.title: Add completion gate approve/reject interaction in dashboard

dod.criterion: When directive status is awaiting_completion, pipeline stepper shows completion step with needsAction=true
Completion gate view renders digest summary inline (or preview)
Approve and reject buttons visible in the completion gate banner
Approve sets directive status to completed, reject keeps in_progress
